headline: 49-year-old Home Depot rival closes hardware store, no bankruptcy
summary: Independent hardware stores and cooperative chains like Do it Best, Ace Hardware, and True Value Hardware face extreme competition from major big-box home improvement centers like Home Depot and Lowe's, which have resulted in the smaller competitors closing their stores when they can no longer ...
